task_completion.description: Agent opens Thunderbird and locates the target emails in the Inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Mozilla Thunderbird application is open, the Inbox is selected, and at least one of the target email subject lines is visible in the message list.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the correct target directory to save the emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Message As' or 'Save As' dialog box is open, and the current directory path is clearly shown as 'Documents/CaseFiles' or '/home/ga/Documents/CaseFiles'.

task_completion.description: The 'Contract Amendment' email is saved as an .eml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or save dialog shows a file named after 'Re: Contract Amendment - Project Atlas Q4' (special characters like colons may be sanitized/removed) with an '.eml' extension inside the CaseFiles directory.

task_completion.description: The 'Settlement Offer' email is saved as an .eml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or save dialog shows a file named after 'Settlement Offer - Martinez v. Consolidated' with an '.eml' extension inside the CaseFiles directory.

task_completion.description: The 'Discovery Documents' email is saved as an .eml file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or save dialog shows a file named after 'Discovery Documents - Case 2024-CV-1847' with an '.eml' extension inside the CaseFiles directory.

task_completion.description: The target directory contains exactly the three required .eml files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the contents of '~/Documents/CaseFiles/' containing exactly the three exported .eml files corresponding to the target subjects, with no extra files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Thunderbird application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Thunderbird GUI being used to view and save the emails, rather than a text editor or terminal being used to create dummy files.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI save functionality to export the emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses 'File -> Save As', 'Save Selected Messages', or right-click context menus in Thunderbird to export the files, rather than using terminal commands to extract raw mbox data.

integrity.description: The saved files appear to be genuine email exports.
integrity.visual_evidence: The files in the file manager should have standard email file icons or sizes indicating they contain actual email headers and bodies, not just empty files or manually typed text files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory for saving the emails is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/CaseFiles'. The three expected emails have the exact subject lines: 'Re: Contract Amendment - Project Atlas Q4', 'Settlement Offer - Martinez v. Consolidated', and 'Discovery Documents - Case 2024-CV-1847'. Note that Thunderbird may sanitize file names during the save process (e.g., replacing colons with spaces or dashes).
